headline: Cramer Likes Applied Digital on the Dip — but Warns: 'Start It Small, Don't Start It Big'
summary: Cramer likes APLD, but advises starting small due to losses. He also recommends buying BE as a non-combustible power source. He says no to LEN and considers XEG a speculative buy. He remains long on ROAD and expects consolidation.
